public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as market broker.
appearance: Heat-scarred protection, ash-set layers, and house-marked gear read as survival equipment first and status second.
manner: Speaks with guarded conviction, as if every promise is measured against an older oath. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a market broker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of market broker in and around Cindervow Quarter, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Cindervow Quarter workable through the obligations of market broker while managing the immediate pressure of rebuilding backlog in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must treat breach as both practical danger and moral failure, which makes compromise costly. Around Cindervow Quarter, that usually means carrying rebuilding backlog, house competition over visibility, structural heat stress without letting the role of market broker visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Vessa Ashvein can offer access or protection if the party preserves a rite, vow, or defended passage under pressure.
Vessa Ashvein needs help holding a threshold, escorting the vulnerable, or investigating a breach of sworn protection near Cindervow Quarter.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V30_3 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Oath-signs, defensive bearing, and ritualized readiness make Vessa Ashvein read as a sworn protector rather than a mere combatant. In Cindervow Quarter, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Rebuilding Oath Courts, Forge Dedication Halls.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Cindervow Quarter: gates, sacred thresholds, escorts, or defended chambers

first_impression: Vessa Ashvein presents as Speaks with guarded conviction, as if every promise is measured against an older oath. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a market broker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Market Broker, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Psanan.
what_they_refuse: Vessa Ashvein refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Market Broker too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Vessa Ashvein can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Vessa Ashvein adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Vessa Ashvein is Known locally through day-to-day work as market broker. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Market Broker.
